zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前价格围绕0.154区间窄幅整理，整体呈低波动震荡结构，短线略偏多但动能有限。价格站上20日均线附近，结构仍维持轻微上行倾向。但缺乏明显突破信号。

MACD维持轻微正值0.0017，动能柱偏多但未形成有效扩张，信号线缺失显示趋势不完整。短线动量仍偏弱震荡。需等待确认放量。信号偏观望。

下方支撑关注0.154156与0.153368的20日均线，上方阻力0.155118一线。若突破则有小级别延续空间。需放量确认。

建议短线以区间交易为主，低位接近支撑分批试多，高位靠近阻力逐步止盈观望。控制仓位避免追涨杀跌。等待确认突破再加仓。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action in ADA/USD is currently characterized by an extremely tight consolidation range just above its short-term moving average. The market has shown minimal volatility over the last 24 hours, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the slight negative daily change, the structure remains mildly constructive as price holds above the 20-period SMA, indicating a fragile but intact short-term bullish bias.

Momentum indicators are sending mixed but cautiously optimistic signals. MACD is slightly positive, showing that recent upward pressure is still present, although the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI is unavailable, reducing overbought or oversold clarity. Overall momentum appears neutral-to-bullish, with no strong divergence suggesting exhaustion or reversal at this stage. Price stability reinforces consolidation conditions.

Immediate support is defined by the session low near 0.154156, with stronger structural support forming around the 20-period SMA at 0.153368. A breakdown below this zone could expose the next demand area near 0.1525. On the upside, resistance is located at the recent high of 0.155118, with a potential extension toward 0.156 if momentum improves. The range suggests a compression phase before potential expansion.

Given the current tight consolidation, traders may consider range-bound strategies rather than breakout positioning. Long entries are preferable near support around 0.1533–0.1541 with tight risk control below the SMA. Short opportunities may emerge near resistance at 0.1551–0.156 if rejection signals appear. A confirmed breakout above 0.156 would shift bias toward continuation, while a breakdown under 0.1533 would favor defensive positioning or short exposure.
